title: Dusted Dutch Tempeh Bowl
description: Fresh, crisp Dutch-inspired bowl with oregano-dusted tempeh, char-grilled vegetables, and a smoky binchotan charcoal glaze, all steamed in a bamboo steamer for a vegan adventure.
instructions: Rinse quinoa, then cook in 200 ml water until fluffy, set aside.
In a bowl, toss tempeh slabs with olive oil, oregano, salt, pepper, and binchotan charcoal powder until evenly coated.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat; sear tempeh slabs for 3 minutes each side until golden and slightly charred, then set aside.
Place broccoli, bell pepper, and carrot into the bamboo steamer basket, add a splash of water, and steam over boiling water for 5 minutes until crisp-tender.
Assemble bowl: start with a base of cooked quinoa, top with steamed veggies, then add the seared tempeh slabs.
Drizzle with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice, sprinkle lemon zest, and optionally add a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.
Serve warm, optionally garnish with chopped fresh parsley for color.
